_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Stakeholder relationship management involves managing stakeholder requirements and communications throughout a project, while remaining focused on the user needs.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to align diverse stakeholder interests around a shared data and AI vision, building coalitions that sustain transformation momentum through organizational changes and competing priorities.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-T-004 (AB, cosine: 0.486), DG-A-005 (DG, cosine: 0.465).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.8/10 (raw 0.284). Shared vocabulary: [stakeholder]. DDaT-only terms [communications, focused, involves, management, managing, needs] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, ai, align, around, building, changes] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.876 (P=0.886, R=0.866). P exceeds R by 0.021 — the DDaT element's 19 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DDaT element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.4%, N:68.2%, C:31.5%). No dominant classification for "Stakeholder relationship management involves managing stakeholder requirements a" vs "Ability to align diverse stakeholder interests around a shared data and AI visio" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.441 > STS 0.284 (gap +0.157). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [stakeholder] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.7%. Shared tokens: [stakeholder]. DDaT-only: [communications, focused, involves, management, managing, needs]. WIDAI-only: [ability, ai, align, around, building, changes].
